segment.name: ServiceStringAdvice
segment.desc: To define the characters selected for use as delimiters and indicators in the rest of the interchange that follows

segment.name: InterchangeHeader
segment.desc: To start, identify and specify an interchange

data_element.name: InterchangeControlReference
data_element.desc: Unique reference assigned by sender

data_element.name: ApplicationReference
data_element.desc: Optionally message identification if the interchange contains only one type of message

data_element.name: ProcessingPriorityCode
data_element.desc: Used if specified in IA

data_element.name: AcknowledgementRequest
data_element.desc: Set = 1 if sender requests acknowledgement, i.e. UNB and UNZ segments received and identified

data_element.name: CommunicationsAgreementId
data_element.desc: If used, to identify type of communication agreement controlling the interchange, e.g. Customs or ECE agreement. Code or name as specified in IA

data_element.name: TestIndicator
data_element.desc: Set = 1 if the interchange is a test. Otherwise not used

segment.name: InterchangeTrailer
segment.desc: To end and check the completeness of an interchange

segment.name: FunctionalGroupHeader
segment.desc: To head, identify and specify a Functional Group

data_element.name: FunctionalGroupIdentification
data_element.desc: Identifies the one message type in the functional group

data_element.name: FunctionalGroupReferenceNumber
data_element.desc: Unique reference number assigned by sender's division, department etc.

data_element.name: ControllingAgency
data_element.desc: Code to identify the agency controlling the specification, maintenance and publication of the message type

data_element.name: ApplicationPassword
data_element.desc: Password to recipient's division, department or sectional system (if required)

segment.name: FunctionalGroupTrailer
segment.desc: To end and check the completeness of a Functional Group

data_element.name: NumberOfMessages
data_element.desc: The count of the number of messages in the functional group

data_element.name: FunctionalGroupReferenceNumber
data_element.desc: Shall be identical to 0048 in UNG

segment.name: MessageHeader
segment.desc: To head, identify and specify a Message

data_element.name: CommonAccessReference
data_element.desc: to relate all subsequent transfers of data to the same business case or file. Within the 35 characters the IA may specify component elements

segment.name: MessageTrailer
segment.desc: To end and check the completeness of a Message

data_element.name: NumberOfSegmentsInTheMessage
data_element.desc: Control count including UNH and UNT

data_element.name: MessageReferenceNumber
data_element.desc: Shall be identical to 0062 in UNH

segment.name: Text
segment.desc: To give information in addition to that in other segments in the service message, as required

data_element.name: TextReferenceCode
data_element.desc: Qualifies and identifies the purpose and function of the segment if indicated in the message specification

data_element.name: FreeFormText
data_element.desc: Not machine-processable information

segment.name: SectionControl
segment.desc: To separate Header, Detail and Summary sections of a message

data_element.name: SectionIdentification
data_element.desc: Separates sections in a message by one of the following codes: D separates the header and detail sections; S separates the detail and summary sections

segment.name: MessageTrailer
segment.desc: To end and check the completeness of a Message

data_element.name: NumberOfSegmentsInTheMessage
data_element.desc: Control count including UNH and UNT

data_element.name: MessageReferenceNumber
data_element.desc: Shall be identical to 0062 in UNH
